Claude #Fable 5 during planning optimizes for agreement and flow rather than strict dependency mapping. That makes its plans easier to read but less rigorous when you need deterministic execution. Use #Opus 4.8 or #Codex 5.5

Using Claude Fable 5 today has showed me the importance of utilizing resources wisely. The capability of the model is real and profound. We don't need to use it for everything. Use it for planning and delegate to lower level models for following Fable's plan.
